title: Linux Process Execution from Unusual Paths
description: Identifies processes running from world-writable or temporary directories, which is a common indicator of post-exploitation activity.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and ('Command Line' like '*/tmp/*' or 'Command Line' like '*/dev/shm/*' or 'Command Line' like '*/var/tmp/*' or 'Command Line' like '*/run/user/*') | stats count as exec_count, distinctcount('Host Name') as host_spread by 'Process Name', 'Command Line' | where exec_count > 1 | sort -host_spread
notes: Legitimate software rarely executes from /tmp or /dev/shm. Any binary in these paths warrants investigation, especially if seen on multiple hosts.
